    preconditions=["isinstance(n, int)", "n >= 1"],
    postconditions=[
        {"when": "always",
         "guarantees": ["isinstance(result, list)",
                        "len(result) >= 1",
                        "result[0] == 1",
                        "all(result[i] < result[i+1] for i in range(len(result)-1))",
                        "result[-1] <= n",
                        "all(x >= 1 for x in result)"]},
        {"when": "n >= 2",
         "guarantees": ["result[1] == 2"]}
    ],
)

)

         "guarantees": ["result == []"]},

)

@certus(
    preconditions=["isinstance(text, str)"],
    postconditions=[
        {"when": "always",
         "guarantees": ["isinstance(result, list)",
                        "all(isinstance(s, str) for s in result)",
                        "all(s[0].isupper() for s in result) if len(result) > 0 else True"]},
        {"when": "len(text) == 0",
         "guarantees": ["result == []"]},
        {"when": "len(text) > 0 and text[0].isupper()",
         "guarantees": ["len(result) >= 1",
                        "''.join(result) == text"]}
    ],
)
